title: dysoxylum pyriforme
intro: Dysoxylum pyriforme, also known as the Philippine pyrifome or Philippine dysoxylum, is a species of tree in the family Meliaceae. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Dysoxylum pyriforme include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. Dysoxylum pyriforme is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or ointment for various herbal applications.
